text: A body is a collection of [Shape, shapes] that are built together. Bodies can be connected to other bodies using [Joint, joints] such as the bearing.

params: Set true if the body is dynamic or false if the body is static. (Defaults to true)

text: Returns a table with all the bodies in the world.
params: The world, will default to the script's world. (optional)

text: Returns a table of tables, which is an array of tables containing bodies grouped by creation.
A creation includes all bodies connected by [Joint, joints], etc.
params: The bodies to find all creation bodies from. {[Body], ...}
return: The table array containing tables of all the bodies, grouped by creation. { {[Body], ...}, ... }

text: Get the lift a body is on.
return: The lift the body is on, or nil if the body is not on a lift.
